name: Going Your Way Transport
recent_news: Listed in 2025 Ohio licensed medical transportation provider directory as Going Your Way Transport L.L.C., 23581 Hartland Drive, Euclid, OH 44123; very small NEMT operator, no school-bus footprint.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus contractor. Micro NEMT/wheelchair-van operator (~3 employees, ~$223K revenue). No district contracts identified; out of scope for Summit tuck-in.

name: Haven Transportation
recent_news: Haven Transportation Service LLC registered with NPI as a 'Bus' classification provider at 25988 Highland Rd, Cleveland, OH 44143; appears to operate as a small van-based NEMT/transport service; no public school-district contracts identified.
fit_notes: Micro operator (~3 employees, ~$223K revenue). Appears to be NEMT/specialty transport, not a yellow-bus school contractor. Too small and wrong-segment for Summit tuck-in.

name: Infinity Medical Trnsprtn
recent_news: Ohio Medical Transportation Board (OMTB) certified NEMT provider at 4246 Wyncote Rd, Cleveland, OH 44121; incorporated 2003; BBB profile opened 9/10/2012; ~$190K annual revenue with ~2 employees per public records.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. Pure NEMT/wheelchair-van shop serving Medicaid/PASSPORT clients. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in.

name: Limo Van Svc
recent_news: Only a yellow-pages-style listing at 27361 Sidney Dr #17, Euclid, OH 44132 with phone (216) 731-7250; no website, no school-district relationships, and no news coverage identified.
fit_notes: Name and registration suggest a limo/sedan/van operator, not a school-bus contractor. Sub-scale (~3 employees) and wrong segment. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Miracle Medical Transportation
districts_or_customers: Ohio Medical Transportation Board licensed; serves Greater Cleveland NEMT clients
recent_news: Miracle Medical Transportation, Inc. founded 2002 in Greater Cleveland; licensed by Ohio Medical Transportation Board; operates from Highland Heights/Solon area; USDOT 3882723 registered; remains a small independent NEMT provider as of 2025-26.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. Pure NEMT/door-to-door medical transport business owned by Faina Uchitel since 2002. Too small and wrong segment for Summit's yellow-bus tuck-in thesis.
